positions.title: Cashier
positions.description: Processed 100+ daily transactions with 100% accuracy, maintaining a balanced register. Assisted 50+ customers per shift, resolving inquiries and ensuring a 95% satisfaction rate. Monitored inventory and enforced liquor law compliance, enhancing store organization and retention.
achievements: Processed 100+ daily transactions with 100% accuracy, maintaining a balanced register.
Assisted 50+ customers per shift, resolving inquiries and ensuring a 95% satisfaction rate.
Monitored inventory and enforced liquor law compliance, enhancing store organization and retention.

positions.title: Data Analyst
positions.description: Conducted data analysis on 200+ loan applications weekly using SQL, Excel, and Python (Pandas, NumPy), achieving a 98% accuracy rate and reducing processing time by 20%. Utilized predictive analytics and machine learning models (Logistic Regression, Decision Trees) to detect loan discrepancies, leading to a 15% increase in approval efficiency. Designed and maintained interactive data dashboards using Power BI and Tableau, visualizing underwriting trends to improve decision-making.
achievements: Conducted data analysis on 200+ loan applications weekly using SQL, Excel, and Python (Pandas, NumPy), achieving a 98% accuracy rate and reducing processing time by 20%.
Utilized predictive analytics and machine learning models (Logistic Regression, Decision Trees) to detect loan discrepancies, leading to a 15% increase in approval efficiency.

positions.title: Technical Support Specialist
positions.description: Managed and analyzed over 500+ user setup datasets for KDOL agents, reducing onboarding time by 25%. Developed automation scripts using Python and SQL to streamline system configurations, reducing manual effort by 30%. Led database optimization efforts, improving data retrieval speed by 40% for internal reporting tools.
